task_completion.description: Read the agricultural mission specification document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/spray_spec.txt'.

task_completion.description: Open QGroundControl and access the mission planning interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The QGroundControl application window is visible with the 'Plan' view active (usually selected at the top left).

task_completion.description: Add a takeoff command and high-speed transit waypoints to the mission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mission item list on the right side of the QGC interface shows a 'Takeoff' item followed by standard 'Waypoint' items.

task_completion.description: Add DO_CHANGE_SPEED commands to control ground speed for transit and spraying.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mission item list includes 'Change Speed' items. The speed values should be visible in the item details (e.g., 8 m/s for transit, 3 m/s for spray).

task_completion.description: Add low-altitude spray waypoints to the mission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mission item list shows 'Waypoint' items with the altitude explicitly set to approximately 8m.

task_completion.description: Add a Return to Launch (RTL) command at the end of the mission.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The mission item list shows a 'Return To Launch' item as the final step in the mission sequence.

task_completion.description: Save the completed mission plan to the specified file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog or QGC file manager interface showing the mission being saved as 'spray_mission.plan' in the '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the QGroundControl GUI to create the mission.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the QGroundControl map and mission item list, not a text editor manually writing the JSON .plan file.

integrity.description: Verify the mission was saved through the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The save action should be performed using QGroundControl's 'Sync' -> 'Save to File' or 'File' menu, rather than terminal commands moving or creating files.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually entered the specific speed and altitude values.
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGC mission item details should show the specific values from the spec (e.g., 8m altitude, 3 m/s and 8 m/s speeds) being typed or set, rather than leaving default values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The specification file is located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/spray_spec.txt. The target spray speed is 3 m/s (acceptable max 4.0), transit speed is 8 m/s (acceptable min 7.0), and spray altitude is 8m AGL (acceptable range 5.0 - 12.0). The final mission must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/spray_mission.plan.
